title: Do campaign war chests win elections?
shortDescription: U.S. elections require massive amounts of funding. Here's what we know about how much campaign war chests make or break a candidate.

title: Trump gunman spotted 90 minutes before shooting, texts show
shortDescription: Members of the Beaver County SWAT team cited communication failures with the Secret Service but acknowledged that "we all failed that day."

title: Will Biden pack the Supreme Court with liberals? What to know about his reforms
shortDescription: Don't expect a Biden to suddenly pack the Supreme Court to balance out the current conservative super-majority. Here's what to know about the election-year proposal.

title: Blinken: US has 'concerns' about Venezuela election result
shortDescription: Secretary of State Antony Blinken said he has "serious concerns" about the election results in Venezuela after both major candidates claimed victory.

title: Venezuela's president, opposition rival both claim election victory
shortDescription: President Nicolas Maduro and opposition rival Edmundo Gonzalez both claimed victory in Venezuela's presidential election as other countries cast doubt on official results.

title: Biden calls for sweeping Supreme Court changes
shortDescription: None of Biden's proposals have any chance of passing in a divided Congress. But they play to the Democratic base upset about the conservative court.

title: Kamala Harris voters in Georgia 'not going back' on abortion
shortDescription: “I want my reproductive rights back. That’s the bottom line." Georgia women say abortion access is their top issue for the 2024 election.

title: US presidential betting odds narrow one week into Harris, Trump race
shortDescription: VP Kamala Harris narrowed her odds against former President Donald Trump in her first week in the presidential race. See the latest election odds.

title: Trump proposes death penalty for drug dealers: Agenda47 on crime
shortDescription: Donald Trump's Agenda47 lays out his plan for a second term. He is likely to face VP Kamala Harris after Joe Biden dropped out. See his crime policies

title: Hillary Clinton's 2016 loss could help Harris against Trump
shortDescription: For many former Clinton supporters, Harris’ impending nomination as the Democratic candidate for president feels like déjà vu.

title: Trump makes rare last-minute dual endorsement in Arizona race
shortDescription: Trump's endorsements come days before the July 30 primary, after many voters have cast early ballots in the 8th Congressional District.

title: Florida man dressed as Uncle Sam travels the country from Trump rally to Trump rally
shortDescription: Uncle Sam is having fun traveling to multiple Trump rallies across the U.S.

title: Donald Trump pledges to make US 'crypto capital of the planet'
shortDescription: The three-day Bitcoin2024 conference, headlined by Donald Trump, ended Saturday, July 27, 2024 at Music City Center in downtown Nashville.

title: Election Day is 100 days away: When does early voting start in each state?
shortDescription: Election Day 2024 may be 100 days away, but voting starts sooner than that in states like Pennsylvania, Virginia and Illinois.

title: House Dems tie Project 2025 to GOP with 100 days until election
shortDescription: House Democrats' campaign arm is seeking to tie swing district Republicans to the sweeping conservative policy playbook.

title: TikTok sell-or-be-banned law safeguards national security, DOJ says
shortDescription: The Justice Department defended a law that could result in TikTok's US ban in a Friday court filing, saying it's about national security, not speech.

title: Trump tells Christians they 'won't have to vote anymore,' if he wins
shortDescription: The GOP presidential nominee delivered the comments during a keynote speech at Turning Point Action’s Believers’ Summit.
